title: The Very Hungry Caterpillar
author: Eric Carle
shortDescription: Follow a tiny caterpillar as he munches his way through the week. A colorful story about counting, food, and growing up.

title: Brown Bear, Brown Bear, What Do You See?
author: Bill Martin Jr.
shortDescription: Meet a cheerful parade of colorful animals in this rhythmic picture book. Its repeating words make it fun to read aloud.

title: The Gruffalo
author: Julia Donaldson
shortDescription: A clever little mouse invents a fearsome creature while walking through the forest. But what happens when the creature turns out to be real?

title: Where the Wild Things Are
author: Maurice Sendak
shortDescription: Sail away with Max to a land filled with wild creatures and exciting adventures. This imaginative story celebrates bravery, feelings, and home.

title: Dinosaurs Before Dark
author: Mary Pope Osborne
shortDescription: Jack and Annie discover a magical tree house that carries them back to the age of dinosaurs. Their first time-traveling adventure is full of mystery and excitement.

title: The Secret Garden
author: Frances Hodgson Burnett
shortDescription: Mary discovers a hidden garden and begins an unforgettable journey of friendship and healing. A timeless adventure about hope, nature, and new beginnings.

title: Peter Pan
author: J. M. Barrie
shortDescription: Fly to Neverland with Peter Pan, Wendy, and the Lost Boys. Their magical adventure is filled with pirates, fairies, and daring escapes.

title: Cinderella
author: Brothers Grimm
shortDescription: With a little magic and plenty of courage, Cinderella attends a royal ball. Discover a classic tale of kindness, hope, and dreams coming true.

title: Beauty and the Beast
author: Gabrielle-Suzanne de Villeneuve
shortDescription: Belle learns that kindness and love can be found in unexpected places. This enchanting fairy tale reminds readers that true beauty comes from within.

title: Goodnight Moon
author: Margaret Wise Brown
shortDescription: Say goodnight to everything in a cozy little room. Gentle words and calming pictures make this a comforting bedtime favorite.

title: The Going to Bed Book
author: Sandra Boynton
shortDescription: A boat full of silly animals gets ready for bed together. Its playful rhymes make bedtime cheerful and relaxing.

title: Ada Twist, Scientist
author: Andrea Beaty
shortDescription: Curious Ada asks questions, investigates clues, and never gives up on a puzzle. Her story encourages young readers to explore the world through science.

title: National Geographic Little Kids First Big Book of Why
author: Amy Shields
shortDescription: Discover simple answers to the big questions curious children love to ask. Bright photographs and fun facts make learning exciting.

title: Highlights Big Fun Activity Book
author: Highlights
shortDescription: Enjoy puzzles, mazes, matching games, and drawing activities on every page. This activity book helps children learn while having fun.

title: Awesome Science Experiments for Kids
author: Crystal Chatterton
shortDescription: Try exciting hands-on experiments using easy-to-find materials. Young scientists can explore chemistry, biology, physics, and more.

title: The Cat in the Hat
author: Dr. Seuss
shortDescription: A rainy day becomes an unforgettable adventure when the Cat in the Hat arrives. Playful rhymes help early readers build confidence.

title: Frog and Toad Are Friends
author: Arnold Lobel
shortDescription: Frog and Toad share simple adventures through every season. Their warm and funny stories celebrate the joy of true friendship.

title: Ang Alamat ng Ampalaya
author: Augie Rivera
shortDescription: Alamin kung paano nagkaroon ng iba't ibang katangian ang mapait na ampalaya. Isang makulay na kuwentong nagtuturo tungkol sa inggit at pagtanggap sa sarili.

title: Sandosenang Sapatos
author: Luis P. Gatmaitan
shortDescription: The father of Karina and Susie is a shoemaker. But only Karina gets to wear the shoes that he makes. “Sorry, Bunso, you will never know how it feels like to wear the beautiful shoes our Tatay makes…” Karina whispers to her sister. Why doesn’t their father make shoes for Susie?

title: May Higante sa Aming Bahay
author: Rhandee Garlitos
shortDescription: A young boy is terrified of the giant that has come to live in their house. His mom and siblings seem to really like him, but who is he? The giant spends time with him and he learns why everyone loves this giant. Now he also loves the giant!

title: Si Pagong at si Matsing
author: Traditional Filipino Folktale
shortDescription: Sundan sina Pagong at Matsing sa isang nakatutuwang kuwento tungkol sa puno ng saging. Itinuturo ng klasikong kuwentong-bayan na mahalaga ang talino, tiyaga, at pagiging patas.

title: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone
author: J. K. Rowling
shortDescription: Harry Potter discovers he is a wizard and begins his first year at Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry. Alongside new friends, he uncovers magical secrets and faces an unforgettable adventure.

title: Winnie-the-Pooh
author: A. A. Milne
shortDescription: Join Winnie-the-Pooh and his friends from the Hundred Acre Wood on heartwarming adventures filled with friendship, kindness, and imagination.

title: Curious George
author: H. A. Rey
shortDescription: Curious George's playful adventures often lead to unexpected surprises. This classic story encourages curiosity, creativity, and learning through fun.

title: The Tale of Peter Rabbit
author: Beatrix Potter
shortDescription: Peter Rabbit sneaks into Mr. McGregor's garden despite his mother's warning. A timeless tale about curiosity, courage, and learning from mistakes.

title: Green Eggs and Ham
author: Dr. Seuss
shortDescription: Sam-I-Am encourages his friend to try a new meal in this playful rhyming classic. A delightful story about keeping an open mind and trying new things.

title: The Rainbow Fish
author: Marcus Pfister
shortDescription: The most beautiful fish in the ocean learns that true happiness comes from sharing with others. A beloved picture book about kindness and friendship.

title: Charlotte's Web
author: E. B. White
shortDescription: Wilbur the pig and Charlotte the spider form an unforgettable friendship. This timeless classic celebrates kindness, loyalty, and the power of true friendship.

title: Alamat ng Pinya
author: Traditional Filipino Folktale
shortDescription: A classic Filipino folktale about Pinang, a young girl who learns the importance of obedience and responsibility. A timeless story that teaches valuable life lessons.

title: Ibong Adarna
author: Traditional Filipino Epic
shortDescription: Prince Don Juan embarks on a magical journey to capture the legendary Ibong Adarna. This Filipino literary classic is filled with adventure, courage, and family devotion.

title: Guess How Much I Love You
author: Sam McBratney
shortDescription: Little Nutbrown Hare and Big Nutbrown Hare share a sweet conversation about love and affection. This gentle story celebrates the special bond between parents and children.

title: Chicka Chicka Boom Boom
author: Bill Martin Jr. and John Archambault
shortDescription: Watch the alphabet letters race up the coconut tree in this fun and rhythmic story. Its catchy words help young children learn letters while enjoying a playful adventure.

title: Matilda
author: Roald Dahl
shortDescription: Matilda is an extraordinary young girl with a brilliant mind and a love for books. She discovers that courage, kindness, and intelligence can overcome even the toughest challenges.

title: Charlie and the Chocolate Factory
author: Roald Dahl
shortDescription: Charlie Bucket wins a golden ticket to the mysterious chocolate factory of Willy Wonka. A magical adventure filled with imagination, surprises, and valuable life lessons.

title: The Little Prince
author: Antoine de Saint-Exupéry
shortDescription: A young prince travels from planet to planet, discovering friendship, love, and the true meaning of life. This timeless classic inspires readers of all ages.

title: The Giving Tree
author: Shel Silverstein
shortDescription: A tree gives everything she has to help the boy she loves throughout his life. A touching story about generosity, love, and selflessness.

title: If You Give a Mouse a Cookie
author: Laura Joffe Numeroff
shortDescription: A simple act of giving a mouse a cookie leads to one funny request after another. A delightful story about cause and effect with playful illustrations.

title: Love You Forever
author: Robert Munsch
shortDescription: A heartfelt story about the enduring love between a parent and child. Its touching message has made it a beloved family classic.

title: The Lorax
author: Dr. Seuss
shortDescription: The Lorax speaks for the trees in this imaginative story about protecting nature. A fun rhyming tale with an important environmental message.

title: How the Grinch Stole Christmas!
author: Dr. Seuss
shortDescription: The Grinch plans to steal Christmas from Whoville but discovers the true spirit of the holiday. A heartwarming classic filled with humor and kindness.

title: One Fish Two Fish Red Fish Blue Fish
author: Dr. Seuss
shortDescription: Meet a colorful cast of silly characters in this playful rhyming book. It's perfect for helping beginning readers build confidence.

title: Are You My Mother?
author: P. D. Eastman
shortDescription: A baby bird sets off on an adventure to find his missing mother. This charming story is a favorite for beginning readers.

title: Enchanted Forest
author: Bella Francis
shortDescription: Step into a magical forest filled with enchanting creatures, hidden paths, and exciting adventures. This imaginative story encourages curiosity, bravery, and a love for nature.

title: Make Way for Ducklings
author: Robert McCloskey
shortDescription: A family of ducklings safely makes its way through the busy streets of Boston. This Caldecott Medal-winning classic celebrates family and perseverance.

title: Polar Bear, Polar Bear, What Do You Hear?
author: Bill Martin Jr. and Eric Carle
shortDescription: A parade of colorful animals introduces the sounds they make in this rhythmic read-aloud favorite. A wonderful companion to Brown Bear, Brown Bear, What Do You See?

title: Green Thumb Poppy
author: Estelle Darcy
shortDescription: Poppy discovers the joy of growing plants and caring for a garden with patience and determination. A heartwarming story that inspires children to appreciate nature and believe in themselves.

title: Pippa's Night Parade
author: Lisa Robinson
shortDescription: Pippa embarks on a magical nighttime adventure where glowing creatures and unexpected friends light the way. A charming story that celebrates imagination, courage, and wonder.

title: Araw sa Palengke
author: May Tobias-Papa
shortDescription: A young girl accompanies her mother to the wet market and discovers for herself the exciting sights, sounds and smells! It’s a tiring but wonderful experience!

title: Sari-Sari Summers
author: Lynnor Bontigao
shortDescription: In this love letter to the Philippines (and to grandmothers), a young girl comes up with a brilliantly delicious way to attract customers after a heat wave leaves her lola’s store empty.

title: Sandangaw
author: Voltaire Q. Oyzon
shortDescription: Little Sandangaw might just be a handspan tall, but he wants to do all the things that bigger children do. If only his family weren't so afraid that he'd be blown away, dragged, or stepped on! When the village magic woman tells him to visit the Eagle of Mt. Danglay for help, Sandangaw learns what it takes to grow.

title: Ang Tikbalang
author: Virgilio S. Almario
shortDescription: Discover the legendary Tikbalang through this engaging retelling by National Artist Virgilio S. Almario. A fun introduction to Filipino folklore and mythology.

title: Ang Lakambini at Ako
author: Becky Bravo
shortDescription: Kilalanin si Ate Oriang, isang mapagkalinga, matapang, at matalinong babae na naging inspirasyon sa isang bata. Isang makabuluhang kuwento tungkol sa kabayanihan, kasaysayan, at pagmamahal sa bayan.

title: Alamat ng Paru Paro
author: Creative Space
shortDescription: This book tells the story of how the butterfly came to be.

title: Adventure Book for Kids
author: Speedy Publishing
shortDescription: This book is about fun adventures that encourage imagination and learning.
